title: NBEAST: An offline desktop GUI for neutron-flux Monte Carlo on OpenMC
description: NBEAST is an offline, open-source desktop application that puts a complete graphical front end on the OpenMC Monte Carlo neutron transport code. It targets reactor-physics education and rapid exploratory analysis, reports statistical uncertainties and source-convergence diagnostics with every result, and supports CAD geometry natively on Apple Silicon via a from-source DAGMC/MOAB build.
